name: Bakewell Tart
recipeIngredient: Butter, cut in small pieces, 14 tbsp
recipeInstructions:
- Pate Brisé: In a food processor, combine flour, granulated sugar, salt, and butter. Pulse with on/off turns until the mixture resembles fine crumbs. In a small bowl, whisk together egg and milk until blended. With the processor running, pour in the egg mixture until the dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl and forms a ball. Divide the dough into two halves. Form each half into a disk shape. Wrap separately in plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 30 minutes.
- Filling: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spread jam in the bottom of the unbaked pastry shell. In a small mixer bowl, cream butter and granulated sugar until thick and white. Beat in egg, ground almonds, cake crumbs, and almond extract until blended. Spoon filling into small mounds all over the top of the jam. Spread evenly over the jam.
- Bake: Place tart on a baking sheet. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes until puffed and set in the center.
- Glaze: In a small saucepan, melt butter. Remove from heat. Sift confectioner's sugar into butter. Stir in cream and vanilla. Mix until blended and smooth. Spread glaze over piping hot tart. Cool on rack.
SERVES: 6
